serverInfo.name: AIShield
serverInfo.description: AI Agent Security Shield — OWASP MCP Top 10 aligned security scanning. 133 rules covering prompt injection, zero-width characters, Rug Pull, permission audit, and dependency monitoring. Features agent one-click onboarding, OpenAPI auto-discovery, and embeddable security badges.

tools.name: security_scan
tools.description: Full security audit for MCP tools/agents with OWASP MCP Top 10 alignment. Returns 5-dimension scores, badge level, and detailed findings.

tools.name: prompt_injection_check
tools.description: Detect prompt injection attacks in Chinese and English. Supports pinyin variants, homophone substitution, zero-width characters, and 200+ pattern matching.

prompt.description: Text to check for prompt injection

tools.name: banned_words_check
tools.description: Detect banned/sensitive words for 6 Chinese platforms: WeChat, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili, Weibo, and general content.

tools.name: rug_pull_detect
tools.description: Detect if an MCP tool has suspicious recent changes like removed security code or added risky modifications (Rug Pull risk).

tools.name: agent_register
tools.description: One-click agent onboarding. Register your agent and get API key, DID identity, and quick start guide.

tools.name: dependency_monitor
tools.description: Monitor MCP tool dependencies for version changes and security risks.
